subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-08-20 in Nazareth
subcodes.first_line: God willing, this Sun of comfort and tranquility shall ere long rise above the horizon of this world, and humanity shall repose upon the cradle of ease and gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله این شمس راحت و آسایش به زودی از افق این جهان طلوع خواهد نمود و مردم در مهد آسایش و سرور خواهند آرمید
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @war and peace, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
